title: IMUSA USA Granite Molcajete Spice Grinder 6-Inch, Gray
description:
About this item
MEASUREMENTS AND BENEFITS: With a 6 inche diameter, this Granite Molcajete is perfect for preparing small to medium sized batches of your favorite recipes, its size provides efficient grinding and mashing of spices, herbs, and more
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Crafted from durable granite with a natural finish, this mortar and pestle set is easy to clean, offers long lasting performance, and features a comfortable, curved pestle for easy use
FUNCTIONALITY & SIZE: With a 6 inche diameter, granite construction, and natural finish, this Molcajete Spice Grinder blends style and durability for everyday use
USAGE: This versatile kitchen tool is perfect for making guacamole, mole, and salsa, as well as crushing, grinding, and mashing garlic, ginger, pepper, spices, vanilla, and more, its multipurpose design makes it suitable for various culinary tasks
IDEAL FOR: Ideal for releasing natural flavorful oils and aromas from vegetables and herbs, this Granite Molcajete is perfect for enhancing your cooking experience
reviews_5s:
Play Video
The IMUSA USA Granite Molcajete Spice Grinder is a game-changer in my kitchen! Not only does it look rustic and authentic on my countertop, but it also crushes and grinds spices, herbs, and even guacamole ingredients like a pro.

The granite feels solid and durable, and the texture creates the perfect surface for blending flavors. Plus, using it makes me feel like a gourmet chef—there’s something so satisfying about grinding spices by hand.Highly recommend !Good productI LOVE this! I had been using a big spoon to smash spices like coriander, cardamom, mustard seed, etc. I needed a mortar and pestle to grind spices but decided on this Molcajete because the base looked more stable and because the shape of the pestle lets you get a good grip from above to smash down with some leverage, versus the long narrow pestles. I originally ordered the 8" which cam in at over 7 lbs for just the base, I am a petite woman and it was just to heavy to use easily. I paid more for this 6", but it is perfect! Not too heavy to empty easily, plenty big enough, grinds all spices in a fraction of the time - it is so fast and easy! And fun! I can't people I've gone so long without this in my kitchen and the fresh ground spices taste SO much better than jars of powder. The construction of this is awesome - solid rock in soothing grey tones. I have ended up using it for a million things I never thought of already. It really is a life hack!This molcajete is said to be made from "granite", but it's carved from a very specific granitic rock called "syenite". Definitely a real rock source --- not artificial.! We prefer the rough texture of volcanic rock, but this smoother texture is easier to clean. This 8" diameter version too large for simple spice grinding., but perfect for larger quantities of salsa....Works so great. I don't have to worry about it breaking.A great mortar and pestle. I love the surface… it help to grind deeper. I got it 40% off, a great find! A nice larg bowl for guac or salsa, and so heavy it stays in place. I love that it’s made in America 🇺🇸I should have bought smaller size - it’s nice but more than I was expectingMuy lindo sirve para decorar además muy prácticoThis molcajete has a lot going for it. The great benefit is the surface of the mortar and pestle are rough which facilitates rapid grinding and mashing. Gets through seeds and herbs in a fraction of the time of the highly polished versions.
Requires a few extra seconds of cleaning but saves minuets of grinding.
Of course the price is exceptional as well.
Great bargain and wish I had bought one like it 40 years ago/Muy bien gracias
reviews_1s:
Thank You for sending this product as seen in the image. I really appreciate that somebody thought this was ok to do thisWorst product on Amazon. Don't buy this. It's dangerous to use as a food vessel. Buyer beware!!Not as expected. The description does not fit the actual productMaybe this has some granite pieces, but this is not solid granite. It was made in a form with concrete material, maybe with granite particles. Box says made in China, although the title says "USA". Bottom line - we're not eating out of this. We did the prepping - grinding rice, grinding water. But, I quickly realized, we're not shaving dust off a solid piece of stone. The whole thing is made of concrete dust. I suggest to look elsewhere for a solid stone mortar & pestle.This is unusable for any food you put in in my opinion. The surface is not polished and flaks of the stone every single grind or even just when you touch it.

It's still a good grinder. Sturdy, good size, heavy, and cute. Just not for food that you want to put in your mouth.

I tried to add another layer of paper or plastic wrap on it, works ok and caused more trouble.

Too much hassles to return as it's heavy.

I used it to grind egg shells for home-made fertilizer and it's perfect! I also used it for home-made facial mask, which is fine to add a bit minerals within it.

The two stars was for the product design and look.I would say don’t waste money on it. The product is made of cement. I try to seasoned it with rice, salt and warm water. But didn’t work. I gave it second then third try but still I am getting the tiny cement particles. What a waste of times and effort. I have posted the picture of my third try for a proof. Guys, stay away from it. I am going to return it asap. Very disappointed.I had ordered twice both time I was disappointed First order I purchased had chipped in edges and pestle stone wasn’t same mortar. Second time had wierd patches on inside and out. Also measurements is not correct. 3 inch high and inner width in 5 inchI purchased this as a gift. Box and item were both damaged but not the plastic bag it was shipped in.
Waste of time and money.The package is very heavy and fragile, mine arrived broken by postal workers. The sender does not put any labeling as to the heavy weight or the fragile contents, logical accompaniments. In order to return it, I have to pay $1 for the sticker and drive to a UPS store (very much defeats the purpose of digital shopping). The mortar and pestle are indeed made of a course granite. My intention was to use this product to crush tablets into powder, this would not have worked well for that purpose because it has the consistency of a driveway in the bowl.Product does not look like picture. Seems to work fine, but was confused upon opening the box.

Product is a much lighter gray, almost white, and base legs are wider than shown on Amazon
